tags.name: m3e-app-bar
tags.description:
A bar, placed a the top of a screen, used to help users navigate through an application.
---


### **Methods:**
 - **attach(control: _HTMLElement_): _void_** - Attaches the element to an interactive control.
- **detach(): _void_** - Detaches the element from its current interactive control.

### **Slots:**
 - **leading** - Renders content positioned at the start of the bar.
- **subtitle** - Renders the subtitle of the bar.
- **title** - Renders the title of the bar.
- **trailing** - Renders one or more action buttons aligned to the end of the bar.
- **leading-icon** - Deprecated: use the `leading` slot.
- **trailing-icon** - Deprecated: use the `trailing` slot.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-app-bar-container-color** - Background color of the app bar container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-container-color-on-scroll** - Background color of the app bar container when scrolled. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-container-elevation** - Elevation (shadow) of the app bar container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-container-elevation-on-scroll** - Elevation (shadow) of the app bar container when scrolled. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-title-text-color** - Color of the app bar title text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-subtitle-text-color** - Color of the app bar subtitle text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-padding-left** - Left padding for the app bar container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-padding-right** - Right padding for the app bar container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-small-container-height** - Height of the small app bar container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-small-title-text-font-size** - Font size for the small app bar title text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-small-title-text-font-weight** - Font weight for the small app bar title text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-small-title-text-line-height** - Line height for the small app bar title text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-small-subtitle-text-tracking** - Letter spacing (tracking) for the small app bar title text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-small-subtitle-text-font-size** - Font size for the small app bar subtitle text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-small-subtitle-text-font-weight** - Font weight for the small app bar subtitle text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-small-subtitle-text-line-height** - Line height for the small app bar subtitle text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-small-subtitle-text-tracking** - Letter spacing (tracking) for the small app bar subtitle text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-small-heading-padding-left** - Left padding for the small app bar heading. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-small-heading-padding-right** - Right padding for the small app bar heading. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-container-height** - Height of the medium app bar container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-container-height-with-subtitle** - Height of the medium app bar container with subtitle. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-title-text-font-size** - Font size for the medium app bar title text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-title-text-font-weight** - Font weight for the medium app bar title text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-title-text-line-height** - Line height for the medium app bar title text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-subtitle-text-tracking** - Letter spacing (tracking) for the medium app bar title text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-subtitle-text-font-size** - Font size for the medium app bar subtitle text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-subtitle-text-font-weight** - Font weight for the medium app bar subtitle text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-subtitle-text-line-height** - Line height for the medium app bar subtitle text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-subtitle-text-tracking** - Letter spacing (tracking) for the medium app bar subtitle text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-heading-padding-left** - Left padding for the medium app bar heading. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-heading-padding-right** - Right padding for the medium app bar heading. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-padding-top** - Top padding for the medium app bar. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-padding-bottom** - Bottom padding for the medium app bar. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-title-max-lines** - Maximum number of lines for the medium app bar title. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-medium-subtitle-max-lines** - Maximum number of lines for the medium app bar subtitle. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-container-height** - Height of the large app bar container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-container-height-with-subtitle** - Height of the large app bar container with subtitle. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-title-text-font-size** - Font size for the large app bar title text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-title-text-font-weight** - Font weight for the large app bar title text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-title-text-line-height** - Line height for the large app bar title text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-subtitle-text-tracking** - Letter spacing (tracking) for the large app bar title text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-subtitle-text-font-size** - Font size for the large app bar subtitle text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-subtitle-text-font-weight** - Font weight for the large app bar subtitle text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-subtitle-text-line-height** - Line height for the large app bar subtitle text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-subtitle-text-tracking** - Letter spacing (tracking) for the large app bar subtitle text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-heading-padding-left** - Left padding for the large app bar heading. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-heading-padding-right** - Right padding for the large app bar heading. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-padding-top** - Top padding for the large app bar. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-padding-bottom** - Bottom padding for the large app bar. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-title-max-lines** - Maximum number of lines for the large app bar title. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-app-bar-large-subtitle-max-lines** - Maximum number of lines for the large app bar subtitle. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: centered

tags.name: m3e-autocomplete
tags.description:
Enhances a text input with suggested options.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Emitted when the committed value changes due to selecting an option or clearing the input.
- **query** - Emitted when the input is focused or when the user modifies its value.
- **toggle** - Emitted when the options menu opens or closes.

### **Methods:**
 - **attach(control: _HTMLElement_): _void_** - Attaches the element to an interactive control.
- **detach(): _void_** - Detaches the element from its current interactive control.
- **clear(restoreFocus): _void_** - Clears the value of the element.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the options of the autocomplete.
- **loading** - Renders content when loading options.
- **no-data** - Renders content when there are no options to show.

attributes.name: auto-activate
attributes.description: Whether the first option should be automatically activated.

attributes.name: case-sensitive
attributes.description: Whether filtering is case sensitive.

attributes.name: filter
attributes.description: Mode in which to filter options.

attributes.name: hide-selection-indicator
attributes.description: Whether to hide the selection indicator.

attributes.name: hide-loading
attributes.description: Whether to hide the menu when loading options.

attributes.name: hide-no-data
attributes.description: Whether to hide the menu when there are no options to show.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Whether options are being loaded.

attributes.name: loading-label
attributes.description: The text announced and presented when loading options.

attributes.name: no-data-label
attributes.description: The text announced and presented when no options are available for the current term.

attributes.name: panel-class
attributes.description: Class or list of classes to be applied to the autocomplete's overlay panel.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Whether the user is required to make a selection when interacting with the autocomplete.

attributes.name: results-label
attributes.description: The text announced when available options change for the current term.

attributes.name: for
attributes.description: The identifier of the interactive control to which this element is attached.

tags.name: m3e-avatar
tags.description:
An image, icon or textual initials representing a user or other identity.
---


### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the content of the avatar.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-avatar-size** - Size of the avatar. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-avatar-shape** - Border radius of the avatar. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-avatar-font-size** - Font size for the avatar. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-avatar-font-weight** - Font weight for the avatar. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-avatar-line-height** - Line height for the avatar. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-avatar-tracking** - Letter spacing for the avatar. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-avatar-color** - Background color of the avatar. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-avatar-label-color** - Text color of the avatar. _(default: undefined)_

An element, nested within a clickable element, used to close a parenting bottom sheet.
---


### **Methods:**
 

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the content of the action.

tags.name: m3e-bottom-sheet
tags.description:
A sheet used to show secondary content anchored to the bottom of the screen.
---


### **Events:**
 - **opening** - Emitted when the sheet begins to open.
- **closing** - Emitted when the sheet begins to close.
- **cancel** - Emitted when the sheet is cancelled.
- **opened** - Emitted when the sheet has opened.
- **closed** - Emitted when the sheet has closed.

### **Methods:**
 - **show(detent: _number_): _void_** - Shows the sheet.
- **hide(): _void_** - Hides the sheet.
- **toggle(detent: _number_): _void_** - Toggles the opened state of the sheet.
- **cycle(): _void_** - Moves the sheet to the next detent.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the content of the sheet.
- **header** - Renders the header of the sheet.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-bottom-sheet-width** - The width of the sheet. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-max-width** - The maximum width of the sheet. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-container-color** - The background color of the sheet container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-elevation** - The elevation level when not modal. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-modal-elevation** - The elevation level when modal. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-full-elevation** - The elevation level when full height. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-z-index** - The z-index of the non-modal sheet. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-minimized-container-shape** - The border radius when minimized. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-container-shape** - The border radius of the sheet container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-full-container-shape** - The border radius when full height. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-scrim-color** - The color of the scrim overlay. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-scrim-opacity** - The opacity of the scrim overlay. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-peek-height** - The visible height when minimized. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-compact-top-space** - The top space in compact mode. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-top-space** - The top space in standard mode. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-padding-block** - The vertical padding. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-padding-inline** - The horizontal padding. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-handle-container-height** - The height of the drag handle container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-handle-width** - The width of the drag handle. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-handle-height** - The height of the drag handle. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-handle-shape** - The border radius of the handle. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-handle-color** - The color of the drag handle. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-handle-focus-ring-offset** - The offset of the focus ring around the handle. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-color** - The foreground (text) color of the sheet. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-content-font-size** - Font size for the sheet content. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-content-font-weight** - Font weight for the sheet content. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-content-line-height** - Line height for the sheet content. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-content-tracking** - Letter spacing (tracking) for the sheet content. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-header-font-size** - Font size for the sheet header. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-header-font-weight** - Font weight for the sheet header. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-header-line-height** - Line height for the sheet header. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-bottom-sheet-header-tracking** - Letter spacing (tracking) for the sheet header. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: detent
attributes.description: The zero‑based index of the detent the sheet should open to.

attributes.name: detents
attributes.description: Detents (discrete height states) the sheet can snap to.

attributes.name: handle
attributes.description:
Whether to display a drag handle and enable the top region of the sheet as a gesture
surface for dragging between detents.

attributes.name: handle-label
attributes.description: The accessible label given to the drag handle.

attributes.name: hideable
attributes.description: Whether the bottom sheet can hide when its swiped down.

attributes.name: hide-friction
attributes.description: The friction coefficient to hide the sheet.

attributes.name: modal
attributes.description: Whether the bottom sheet behaves as modal.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the bottom sheet is open.

attributes.name: overshoot-limit
attributes.description: A fractional value, between 0 and 100, indicating the maximum visual overshoot allowed when dragging past the minimum or maximum size.

attributes.description: Marks this trigger as a secondary trigger for accessibility. Secondary triggers do not receive ARIA ownership.

tags.name: m3e-button
tags.description:
A button users interact with to perform an action.
---


### **Events:**
 - **input** - Dispatched when a toggle button's selected state changes.
- **change** - Dispatched when a toggle button's selected state changes.
- **click** - Emitted when the element is clicked.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the label of the button.
- **icon** - Renders an icon before the button's label.
- **selected** - Renders the label of the button, when selected.
- **selected-icon** - Renders an icon before the button's label, when selected.
- **trailing-icon** - Renders an icon after the button's label.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-button-container-height** - Height of the button container, for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-outline-thickness** - Thickness of the button outline, for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-label-text-font-size** - Font size for the label text, for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-label-text-font-weight** - Font weight for the label text, for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-label-text-line-height** - Line height for the label text, for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-label-text-tracking** - Letter tracking for the label text, for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-icon-size** - Size of the icon, for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-shape-round** - Corner radius for round shape, for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-shape-square** - Corner radius for square shape, for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-selected-shape-round** - Corner radius when selected (round), for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-selected-shape-square** - Corner radius when selected (square), for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-shape-pressed-morph** - Corner radius when pressed, for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-leading-space** - Space before icon or label, for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-trailing-space** - Space after icon or label, for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-icon-label-space** - Space between icon and label, for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-container-height** - Height of the button container, for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-outline-thickness** - Thickness of the button outline, for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-label-text-font-size** - Font size for the label text, for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-label-text-font-weight** - Font weight for the label text, for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-label-text-line-height** - Line height for the label text, for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-label-text-tracking** - Letter tracking for the label text, for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-icon-size** - Size of the icon, for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-shape-round** - Corner radius for round shape, for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-shape-square** - Corner radius for square shape, for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-selected-shape-round** - Corner radius when selected (round), for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-selected-shape-square** - Corner radius when selected (square), for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-shape-pressed-morph** - Corner radius when pressed, for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-leading-space** - Space before icon or label, for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-button-extra-small-trailing-space** - Space after icon or label, for the extra-small size variant. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether the element is disabled.

attributes.description: A value indicating whether the `target` of the link button will be downloaded, optionally specifying the new name of the file.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: The URL to which the link button points.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the element, submitted as a pair with the element's `value` as part of form data, when the element is used to submit a form.

attributes.name: rel
attributes.description: The relationship between the `target` of the link button and the document.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Whether the toggle button is selected.

attributes.name: size

attributes.name: target

attributes.name: toggle
attributes.description: Whether the button will toggle between selected and unselected states.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The type of the element.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The value associated with the element's name when it's submitted with form data.

attributes.description: The appearance variant of the button.

tags.name: m3e-button-group

tags.name: m3e-calendar
tags.description:
A calendar used to select a date.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Emitted when the selected date changes.

### **Methods:**
 - **focusActiveCell(): _Promise<void>_** - Asynchronously focuses the active date.
- **updateTodayDate(): _void_** - Updates today's date.
- **movePreviousPeriod(): _Promise<void>_** - Moves the calendar to the previous period.
- **moveNextPeriod(): _Promise<void>_** - Moves the calendar to the next period.
- **togglePeriod(): _Promise<void>_** - Toggles the current period.

### **Slots:**
 - **header** - Renders the header of the calendar.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-calendar-container-color** - Background color of the container surface. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-container-elevation** - Elevation shadow applied to the container surface. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-container-shape** - Corner radius of the container surface. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-padding** - Padding applied to the calendar header and body. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-period-button-text-color** - Text color used for the period‑navigation buttons in the header. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-weekday-font-size** - Font size of weekday labels in month view. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-weekday-font-weight** - Font weight of weekday labels in month view. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-weekday-line-height** - Line height of weekday labels in month view. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-weekday-tracking** - Letter spacing of weekday labels in month view. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-weekday-color** - Text color for weekday labels in month view. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-date-font-size** - Font size of date cells in month view. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-date-font-weight** - Font weight of date cells in month view. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-date-line-height** - Line height of date cells in month view. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-date-tracking** - Letter spacing of date cells in month view. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-font-size** - Font size of items in year and multi‑year views. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-font-weight** - Font weight of items in year and multi‑year views. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-line-height** - Line height of items in year and multi‑year views. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-tracking** - Letter spacing of items in year and multi‑year views. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-color** - Text color for date items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-selected-color** - Text color for selected date items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-selected-container-color** - Background color for selected date items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-selected-ripple-color** - Ripple color used when interacting with selected date items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-selected-hover-color** - Hover color used when interacting with selected date items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-selected-focus-color** - Focus color used when interacting with selected date items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-current-outline-thickness** - Outline thickness used to indicate the current date. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-current-outline-color** - Outline color used to indicate the current date. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-special-color** - Text color for dates marked as special. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-special-container-color** - Background color for dates marked as special. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-special-ripple-color** - Ripple color used when interacting with dates marked as special. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-special-hover-color** - Hover color used when interacting with dates marked as special. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-special-focus-color** - Focus color used when interacting with dates marked as special. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-range-container-color** - Background color applied to the selected date range. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-range-color** - Text color for dates within a selected range. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-disabled-color** - Color used for disabled date items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-item-disabled-color-opacity** - Opacity applied to the disabled item color. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-calendar-slide-animation-duration** - Duration of slide transitions between calendar views. _(default: undefined)_

tags.name: m3e-month-view
tags.description:
An internal component used to display a single month in a calendar.
---

tags.name: m3e-checkbox
tags.description:
A checkbox that allows a user to select one or more options from a limited number of choices.
---


### **Events:**
 - **input** - Emitted when the checked state changes.
- **change** - Emitted when the checked state changes.
- **invalid** - Emitted when a form is submitted and the element fails constraint validation.
- **click** - Emitted when the element is clicked.

### **Methods:**
 - **markAsPristine(): _void_** - Marks the element as pristine.
- **markAsDirty(): _void_** - Marks the element as dirty.
- **markAsTouched(): _void_** - Marks the element as touched.
- **markAsUntouched(): _void_** - Marks the element as untouched.
- **reportValidity(): _boolean_** - Returns `true` if the element has no validity problems; otherwise, returns `false`, fires
an invalid event, and (if the event isn't canceled) reports the problem to the user.
- **checkValidity(): _boolean_** - Returns `true` if the element has no validity problems; otherwise,
returns `false`, fires an invalid event.
- **setCustomValidity(error: _string_): _void_** - Sets a custom validity message for the element.
- **formDisabledCallback(disabled: _boolean_): _void_** - Called when the element is disabled or enabled via its form association.
- **formResetCallback(): _void_** - Called when the associated form is reset.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-checkbox-icon-size** - Size of the checkbox icon inside the container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-container-size** - Base size of the checkbox container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-container-shape** - Border radius of the icon container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-unselected-outline-thickness** - Border thickness for unselected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-unselected-outline-color** - Border color for unselected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-unselected-hover-outline-color** - Border color on hover when unselected. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-unselected-disabled-outline-color** - Base color for disabled unselected outline. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-unselected-disabled-outline-opacity** - Opacity for disabled unselected outline. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-unselected-error-outline-color** - Border color for invalid unselected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-selected-container-color** - Background color for selected container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-selected-icon-color** - Icon color for selected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-selected-disabled-container-color** - Base color for disabled selected container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-selected-disabled-container-opacity** - Opacity for disabled selected container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-selected-disabled-icon-color** - Base color for disabled selected icon. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-selected-disabled-icon-opacity** - Opacity for disabled selected icon. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-unselected-hover-color** - Ripple hover color for unselected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-unselected-focus-color** - Ripple focus color for unselected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-unselected-ripple-color** - Ripple base color for unselected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-selected-hover-color** - Ripple hover color for selected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-selected-focus-color** - Ripple focus color for selected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-selected-ripple-color** - Ripple base color for selected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-unselected-error-hover-color** - Ripple hover color for invalid unselected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-unselected-error-focus-color** - Ripple focus color for invalid unselected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-unselected-error-ripple-color** - Ripple base color for invalid unselected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-selected-error-hover-color** - Ripple hover color for invalid selected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-selected-error-focus-color** - Ripple focus color for invalid selected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-checkbox-selected-error-ripple-color** - Ripple base color for invalid selected state. _(default: undefined)_

- **--m3e-chip-padding-end** - Default end padding when no trailing icon is present. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-chip-with-icon-padding-start** - Start padding when leading icon is present. _(default: undefined)_

- **--m3e-chip-disabled-icon-color** - Base color for disabled icons. _(default: undefined)_

 - **--m3e-chip-container-shape** - Border radius of the chip container. _(default: undefined)_

- **--m3e-chip-icon-color** - Icon color in default state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-chip-icon-size** - Font size of leading/trailing icons. _(default: undefined)_

- **--m3e-chip-disabled-icon-color** - Base color for disabled icons. _(default: undefined)_

returns `false`, fires an invalid event.

tags.name: m3e-datepicker
tags.description:
Presents a date picker on a temporary surface.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when the selected date changes.
- **beforetoggle** - Dispatched before the toggle state changes.
- **toggle** - Dispatched after the toggle state has changed.

### **Methods:**
 - **show(trigger: _HTMLElement_, anchor: _HTMLElement | undefined_): _Promise<void>_** - Opens the picker.
- **hide(restoreFocus: _boolean_): _void_** - Hides the picker.
- **toggle(trigger: _HTMLElement_, anchor: _HTMLElement | undefined_): _Promise<void>_** - Toggles the picker.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-datepicker-container-padding-block** - Block‑axis padding of the date picker container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-container-padding-inline** - Inline‑axis padding of the date picker container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-container-color** - Background color of the standard container surface. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-container-elevation** - Elevation shadow applied to the container surface. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-modal-headline-color** - Color used for the modal headline text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-modal-headline-font-size** - Font size used for the modal headline text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-modal-headline-font-weight** - Font weight used for the modal headline text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-modal-headline-line-height** - Line height used for the modal headline text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-modal-headline-tracking** - Letter spacing used for the modal headline text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-modal-supporting-text-color** - Color used for supporting text in modal mode. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-modal-supporting-text-font-size** - Font size used for supporting text in modal mode. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-modal-supporting-text-font-weight** - Font weight used for supporting text in modal mode. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-modal-supporting-text-line-height** - Line height used for supporting text in modal mode. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-modal-supporting-text-tracking** - Letter spacing used for supporting text in modal mode. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-actions-padding-inline** - Inline‑axis padding of the action row. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-docked-container-color** - Background color of the container in docked mode. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-docked-container-shape** - Corner radius of the container in docked mode. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-modal-container-color** - Background color of the container in modal mode. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-datepicker-modal-container-shape** - Corner radius of the container in modal mode. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-divider-thickness** - Thickness of divider elements within the picker. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-divider-color** - Color of divider rules within the picker. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-dialog-scrim-color** - Base color used for the modal scrim behind the picker. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-dialog-scrim-opacity** - Opacity applied to the scrim color in modal mode. _(default: undefined)_

tags.name: m3e-expansion-header

A button used to toggle the expanded state of an expansion panel.
---


### **Events:**
 - **click** - Emitted when the element is clicked.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the content of the header.
- **toggle-icon** - Renders the icon of the expansion toggle.

 - **--m3e-expansion-header-collapsed-height** - Height of the header when the panel is collapsed. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-expanded-height** - Height of the header when the panel is expanded. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-padding-left** - Left padding inside the header. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-padding-right** - Right padding inside the header. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-spacing** - Spacing between header elements. _(default: undefined)_

- **--m3e-expansion-header-font-size** - The font size of the header text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-font-weight** - The font weight of the header text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-line-height** - The line height of the header text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-tracking** - Letter spacing (tracking) of the header text. _(default: undefined)_

tags.name: m3e-expansion-panel
tags.description:
An expandable details-summary view.
---


### **Events:**
 - **opening** - Emitted when the expansion panel begins to open.
- **opened** - Emitted when the expansion panel has opened.
- **closing** - Emitted when the expansion panel begins to close.
- **closed** - Emitted when the expansion panel has closed.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the detail of the panel.
- **actions** - Renders the actions bar of the panel.
- **header** - Renders the header content.
- **toggle-icon** - Renders the expansion toggle icon.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-expansion-header-collapsed-height** - Height of the header when the panel is collapsed. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-expanded-height** - Height of the header when the panel is expanded. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-padding-left** - Left padding inside the header. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-padding-right** - Right padding inside the header. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-spacing** - Spacing between header elements. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-toggle-icon-size** - Size of the toggle icon (e.g. chevron). _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-font-size** - The font size of the header text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-font-weight** - The font weight of the header text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-line-height** - The line height of the header text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-header-tracking** - Letter spacing (tracking) of the header text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-panel-text-color** - Color of the panel's text content. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-panel-disabled-text-color** - Color of the panel's text content, when disabled. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-panel-disabled-text-opacity** - Opacity of the panel's text content, when disabled. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-panel-container-color** - Background color of the panel container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-panel-elevation** - Elevation level when the panel is collapsed. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-panel-shape** - Shape (e.g. border radius) of the panel when collapsed. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-panel-open-elevation** - Elevation level when the panel is expanded. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-panel-open-shape** - Shape (e.g. border radius) of the panel when expanded. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-panel-content-padding** - Padding around the panel's content area. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-panel-actions-spacing** - Spacing between action buttons or elements. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-panel-actions-padding** - Padding around the actions section. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-panel-actions-divider-thickness** - Thickness of the divider above actions. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expansion-panel-actions-divider-color** - Color of the divider above actions. _(default: undefined)_

tags.name: m3e-fab-menu
tags.description:
A menu, opened from a floating action button (FAB), used to display multiple related actions.
---


### **Events:**
 - **beforetoggle** - Dispatched before the toggle state changes.
- **toggle** - Dispatched after the toggle state has changed.

### **Methods:**
 - **show(trigger: _HTMLElement_): _Promise<void>_** - Opens the menu.
- **hide(restoreFocus: _boolean_): _void_** - Hides the menu.
- **toggle(trigger: _HTMLElement_): _Promise<void>_** - Toggles the menu.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the contents of the menu.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-fab-menu-spacing** - Vertical gap between menu items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-fab-menu-max-width** - Maximum width of the menu. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-primary-fab-color** - Foreground color for primary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-primary-fab-container-color** - Container color for primary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-primary-fab-hover-color** - Hover background color for primary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-primary-fab-focus-color** - Focus background color for primary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-primary-fab-ripple-color** - Ripple color for primary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-secondary-fab-color** - Foreground color for secondary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-secondary-fab-container-color** - Container color for secondary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-secondary-fab-hover-color** - Hover background color for secondary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-secondary-fab-focus-color** - Focus background color for secondary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-secondary-fab-ripple-color** - Ripple color for secondary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tertiary-fab-color** - Foreground color for tertiary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tertiary-fab-container-color** - Container color for tertiary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tertiary-fab-hover-color** - Hover background color for tertiary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tertiary-fab-focus-color** - Focus background color for tertiary variant items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tertiary-fab-ripple-color** - Ripple color for tertiary variant items. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The appearance variant of the menu.

tags.name: m3e-menu-item
tags.description:
An item of a floating action button (FAB) menu.
---


### **Events:**
 - **click** - Emitted when the element is clicked.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the label of the item.
- **icon** - Renders an icon before the items's label.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-fab-menu-item-height** - Height of the menu item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-fab-menu-item-font-size** - Font size of the menu item label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-fab-menu-item-font-weight** - Font weight of the menu item label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-fab-menu-item-line-height** - Line height of the menu item label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-fab-menu-item-tracking** - Letter spacing of the menu item label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-fab-menu-item-shape** - Border radius of the menu item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-fab-menu-item-leading-space** - Padding at the start of the menu item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-fab-menu-item-trailing-space** - Padding at the end of the menu item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-fab-menu-item-spacing** - Gap between icon and label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-fab-menu-item-icon-size** - Size of the icon in the menu item. _(default: undefined)_

- **detach(): _void_** - Detaches the element from its current interactive control.

tags.name: m3e-form-field
tags.description:
A container for form controls that applies Material Design styling and behavior.
---


### **Methods:**
 - **notifyControlStateChange(checkValidity: _boolean_): _void_** - Notifies the form field that the state of the hosted `control` has changed.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the control of the field.
- **prefix** - Renders content before the fields's control.
- **prefix-text** - Renders text before the fields's control.
- **suffix** - Renders content after the fields's control.
- **suffix-text** - Renders text after the fields's control.
- **hint** - Renders hint text in the fields's subscript, when the control is valid.
- **error** - Renders error text in the fields's subscript, when the control is invalid.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-form-field-font-size** - Font size for the form field container text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-font-weight** - Font weight for the form field container text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-line-height** - Line height for the form field container text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-tracking** - Letter spacing for the form field container text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-label-font-size** - Font size for the floating label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-label-font-weight** - Font weight for the floating label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-label-line-height** - Line height for the floating label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-label-tracking** - Letter spacing for the floating label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-subscript-font-size** - Font size for hint and error text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-subscript-font-weight** - Font weight for hint and error text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-subscript-line-height** - Line height for hint and error text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-subscript-tracking** - Letter spacing for hint and error text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-color** - Text color for the form field container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-subscript-color** - Color for hint and error text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-invalid-color** - Color used when the control is invalid. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-focused-outline-color** - Outline color when focused. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-focused-color** - Label color when focused. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-outline-color** - Outline color in outlined variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-container-color** - Background color in filled variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-hover-container-color** - Hover background color in filled variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-width** - Width of the form field container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-icon-size** - Size of prefix and suffix icons. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-outlined-form-field-container-shape** - Corner radius for outlined container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-container-shape** - Corner radius for filled container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-hover-container-opacity** - Opacity for hover background in filled variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-disabled-opacity** - Opacity for disabled text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-disabled-container-opacity** - Opacity for disabled container background. _(default: undefined)_

tags.name: m3e-icon
tags.description:
A small symbol used to easily identify an action or category.
---

attributes.name: filled
attributes.description: Whether the icon is filled.

attributes.name: grade
attributes.description: The grade of the icon.

attributes.name: optical-size
attributes.description: A value from 20 to 48 indicating the optical size of the icon.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the icon.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The appearance variant of the icon.

attributes.name: weight
attributes.description: A value from 100 to 700 indicating the weight of the icon.

tags.name: m3e-icon-button
tags.description:
An icon button users interact with to perform a supplementary action.
---


### **Events:**
 - **input** - Dispatched when a toggle button's selected state changes.
- **change** - Dispatched when a toggle button's selected state changes.
- **click** - Emitted when the element is clicked.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the icon of the button.
- **selected** - Renders an icon, when selected.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-icon-button-container-height** - Height of the container for all size variants. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether the element is disabled.

attributes.name: disabled-interactive
attributes.description: Whether the element is disabled and interactive.

attributes.name: download
attributes.description: A value indicating whether the `target` of the link button will be downloaded, optionally specifying the new name of the file.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: The URL to which the link button points.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the element, submitted as a pair with the element's `value` as part of form data, when the element is used to submit a form.

attributes.name: rel
attributes.description: The relationship between the `target` of the link button and the document.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Whether the toggle button is selected.

attributes.name: shape
attributes.description: The shape of the button.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the button.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: The target of the link button.

attributes.name: toggle
attributes.description: Whether the button will toggle between selected and unselected states.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The type of the element.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The value associated with the element's name when it's submitted with form data.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The appearance variant of the button.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: The width of the button.

tags.name: m3e-action-list
tags.description:
A list of actions.
---


### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the items of the list.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-list-divider-inset-start-size** - Start inset for dividers within the list. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-divider-inset-end-size** - End inset for dividers within the list. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-segmented-list-segment-gap** - Gap between list items in segmented variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-segmented-list-container-shape** - Border radius of the segmented list container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-segmented-list-item-container-color** - Background color of items in segmented variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-segmented-list-item-disabled-container-color** - Background color of disabled items in segmented variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-segmented-list-item-container-shape** - Border radius of items in segmented variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-segmented-list-item-hover-container-shape** - Border radius of items in segmented variant on hover. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-segmented-list-item-focus-container-shape** - Border radius of items in segmented variant on focus. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-segmented-list-item-selected-container-shape** - Border radius of items in segmented variant when selected. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.description: The appearance variant of the list.

tags.name: m3e-expandable-list-item
tags.description:
An item in a list that can be expanded to show more items.
---


### **Events:**
 - **opening** - Emitted when the item begins to open.
- **opened** - Emitted when the item has opened.
- **closing** - Emitted when the item begins to close.
- **closed** - Emitted when the item has closed.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the content of the list item.
- **leading** - Renders the leading content of the list item.
- **overline** - Renders the overline of the list item.
- **supporting-text** - Renders the supporting text of the list item.
- **toggle-icon** - Renders a custom icon for the expand/collapse toggle.
- **items** - Container for child list items displayed when expanded.
- **trailing** - This component does not expose the base trailing slot.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-expandable-list-item-toggle-icon-container-width** - Width of the toggle icon container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expandable-list-item-toggle-icon-container-shape** - Border radius of the toggle icon container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expandable-list-item-toggle-icon-size** - Size of the toggle icon. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expandable-list-item-expanded-toggle-icon-container-color** - Background color of the toggle icon container when expanded. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expandable-list-item-bounce-duration** - Duration of the bounce animation when expanding. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expandable-list-item-bounce-factor** - Multiplication factor for the bounce effect. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-expandable-list-item-expand-duration** - Duration of the expand/collapse animation. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-between-space** - Horizontal gap between elements. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-padding-inline** - Horizontal padding for the list item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-padding-block** - Vertical padding for the list item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-height** - Minimum height of the list item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-font-size** - Font size for main content. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-font-weight** - Font weight for main content. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-line-height** - Line height for main content. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-tracking** - Letter spacing for main content. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-overline-font-size** - Font size for overline slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-overline-font-weight** - Font weight for overline slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-overline-line-height** - Line height for overline slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-overline-tracking** - Letter spacing for overline slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-supporting-text-font-size** - Font size for supporting text slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-supporting-text-font-weight** - Font weight for supporting text slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-supporting-text-line-height** - Line height for supporting text slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-supporting-text-tracking** - Letter spacing for supporting text slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-trailing-text-font-size** - Font size for trailing supporting text slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-list-item-trailing-text-font-weight** - Font weight for trailing supporting text slot. _(default: undefined)_

- **--m3e-list-item-three-line-top-offset** - Top offset for media in three line items. _(default: undefined)_

tags.name: m3e-menu
tags.description:
Presents a list of choices on a temporary surface.
---


### **Events:**
 - **beforetoggle** - Dispatched before the toggle state changes.
- **toggle** - Dispatched after the toggle state has changed.

### **Methods:**
 - **show(trigger: _HTMLElement_): _Promise<void>_** - Opens the menu.
- **hide(restoreFocus: _boolean_): _void_** - Hides the menu.
- **hideAll(restoreFocus: _boolean_): _void_** - Closes this menu and any parenting menus.
- **toggle(trigger: _HTMLElement_): _Promise<void>_** - Toggles the menu.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the contents of the menu.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-menu-container-shape** - Controls the corner radius of the menu container. _(default: undefined)_

- **--m3e-menu-container-min-width** - Minimum width of the menu container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-menu-container-max-width** - Maximum width of the menu container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-menu-container-max-height** - Maximum height of the menu container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-menu-container-padding-block** - Vertical padding inside the menu container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-menu-container-padding-inline** - Horizontal padding inside the menu container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-menu-container-color** - Background color of the menu container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-menu-container-elevation** - Box shadow elevation of the menu container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-vibrant-menu-container-color** - Background color of the menu container for vibrant variant. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-menu-divider-spacing** - Vertical spacing around slotted `m3e-divider` elements. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-menu-gap** - Gap between content in the menu. _(default: undefined)_

A hierarchical menu, typically used on larger devices, that allows a user to switch between views.
---


### **Methods:**
 - **expand(descendants: _boolean_): _void_** - Expands all items, and optionally, all descendants.
- **expand(items: _M3eNavMenuItemElement[]_, descendants: _boolean_): _void_** - Expands the specified items, and optionally, all descendants.
- **collapse(descendants: _boolean_): _void_** - Collapses all items, and optionally, all descendants.
- **collapse(items: _M3eNavMenuItemElement[]_, descendants: _boolean_): _void_** - Collapses the specified items, and optionally, all descendants.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the items of the menu.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-nav-menu-padding-top** - Top padding for the menu. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-padding-bottom** - Bottom padding for the menu. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-padding-left** - Left padding for the menu. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-padding-right** - Right padding for the menu. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-divider-margin** - Margin for divider elements in the menu. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-scrollbar-width** - Width of the menu scrollbar. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-scrollbar-color** - Color of the menu scrollbar. _(default: undefined)_

tags.name: m3e-nav-menu-item
tags.description:
An expandable item, selectable item within a navigation menu.
---


### **Events:**
 - **opening** - Emitted when the item begins to open.
- **opened** - Emitted when the item has opened.
- **closing** - Emitted when the item begins to close.
- **closed** - Emitted when the item has closed.
- **click** - Emitted when the element is clicked.

### **Methods:**
 - **expand(descendants: _boolean_): _void_** - Expands this item, and optionally, all descendants.
- **collapse(descendants: _boolean_): _void_** - Collapses this item, and optionally, all descendants.
- **toggle(): _void_** - Toggles the expanded state of the item.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the nested child items.
- **label** - Renders the label of the item.
- **icon** - Renders the icon of the item.
- **badge** - Renders the badge of the item.
- **selected-icon** - Renders the icon of the item when selected.
- **toggle-icon** - Renders the toggle icon.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-nav-menu-item-font-size** - Font size for the item label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-font-weight** - Font weight for the item label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-line-height** - Line height for the item label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-tracking** - Letter spacing for the item label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-padding** - Inline padding for the item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-height** - Height of the item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-spacing** - Spacing between icon and label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-shape** - Border radius of the item and focus ring. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-icon-size** - Size of the icon. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-inset** - Indentation for nested items. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-label-color** - Text color for the item label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-selected-label-color** - Text color for selected item label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-selected-container-color** - Background color for selected item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-selected-container-focus-color** - Focus color for selected item container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-selected-container-hover-color** - Hover color for selected item container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-selected-ripple-color** - Ripple color for selected item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-unselected-container-focus-color** - Focus color for unselected item container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-unselected-container-hover-color** - Hover color for unselected item container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-unselected-ripple-color** - Ripple color for unselected item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-open-container-color** - Background color for open item with children. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-open-container-focus-color** - Focus color for open item container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-open-container-hover-color** - Hover color for open item container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-open-ripple-color** - Ripple color for open item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-disabled-color** - Text color for disabled item. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-disabled-color-opacity** - Opacity for disabled item text color. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-badge-font-size** - Font size for badge slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-badge-font-weight** - Font weight for badge slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-badge-line-height** - Line height for badge slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-badge-tracking** - Letter spacing for badge slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-divider-margin** - Margin for divider elements. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-nav-menu-item-vertical-inset** - Vertical margin for first/last child items. _(default: undefined)_

A container for a set of radio buttons.

### **Events:**

### **Methods:**
 - **markAsTouched(): _void_** - Marks the element as touched.
- **markAsUntouched(): _void_** - Marks the element as untouched.
- **markAsDirty(): _void_** - Marks the element as dirty.
- **markAsPristine(): _void_** - Marks the element as pristine.
- **reportValidity(): _boolean_** - Returns `true` if the element has no validity problems; otherwise, returns `false`, fires
an invalid event, and (if the event isn't canceled) reports the problem to the user.
- **checkValidity(): _boolean_** - Returns `true` if the element has no validity problems; otherwise,
returns `false`, fires an invalid event.
- **setCustomValidity(error: _string_): _void_** - Sets a custom validity message for the element.
- **formDisabledCallback(disabled: _boolean_): _void_** - Called when the element is disabled or enabled via its form association.
- **formResetCallback(): _void_** - Called when the associated form is reset.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the radio buttons of the group.

tags.description:
A bar that provides a prominent entry point for search.
---


### **Events:**
 - **clear** - Dispatched when the search term is cleared.

### **Methods:**
 - **clear(): _void_** - Clears the search term.

### **Slots:**
 - **leading** - Renders content before the input of the bar.
- **input** - Renders the input of the bar.
- **trailing** - Renders content after the input of the bar.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-search-bar-container-color** - Background color of the search bar container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-bar-leading-icon-color** - Color of the leading icon. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-bar-trailing-icon-color** - Color of the trailing icon. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-bar-container-height** - Height of the search bar container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-bar-container-shape** - Shape (border radius) of the search bar container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-bar-icon-size** - Size of icons inside the search bar. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-bar-supporting-text-color** - Color of the supporting text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-bar-supporting-text-font-size** - Font size of the supporting text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-bar-supporting-text-font-weight** - Font weight of the supporting text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-bar-supporting-text-line-height** - Line height of the supporting text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-bar-supporting-text-tracking** - Letter spacing of the supporting text. _(default: undefined)_

tags.name: m3e-search-view
tags.description:
A surface that presents suggestions and results for a search.
---


### **Events:**

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - When open, renders the results content of the view.

- **open-trailing** - When open, renders content after the input of the view.
- **closed-leading** - When closed, renders content before the input of the view.
- **closed-trailing** - When closed, renders content after the input of the view.

- **--m3e-search-view-docked-container-shape** - Shape of the docked view container. _(default: undefined)_

- **--m3e-search-view-contained-leading-margin** - Leading margin for the contained view. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-view-contained-trailing-margin** - Trailing margin for the contained view. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-view-contained-focused-leading-margin** - Leading margin when the contained view is focused. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-view-contained-focused-trailing-margin** - Trailing margin when the contained view is focused. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-search-view-contained-docked-bar-results-gap** - Gap between the contained docked bar and results. _(default: undefined)_

tags.name: m3e-select
tags.description:
A form control that allows users to select a value from a set of predefined options.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Emitted when the selected state changes.
- **toggle**
- **input** - Emitted when the selected state changes.

### **Methods:**
 - **clear(restoreFocus): _void_** - Clears the value of the element.
- **markAsPristine(): _void_** - Marks the element as pristine.
- **markAsDirty(): _void_** - Marks the element as dirty.
- **markAsTouched(): _void_** - Marks the element as touched.
- **markAsUntouched(): _void_** - Marks the element as untouched.
- **reportValidity(): _boolean_** - Returns `true` if the element has no validity problems; otherwise, returns `false`, fires
an invalid event, and (if the event isn't canceled) reports the problem to the user.
- **checkValidity(): _boolean_** - Returns `true` if the element has no validity problems; otherwise,
returns `false`, fires an invalid event.
- **setCustomValidity(error: _string_): _void_** - Sets a custom validity message for the element.
- **formDisabledCallback(disabled: _boolean_): _void_** - Called when the element is disabled or enabled via its form association.
- **formResetCallback(): _void_** - Called when the associated form is reset.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the options of the select.
- **arrow** - Renders the dropdown arrow.
- **value** - Renders the selected value(s).

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-form-field-font-size** - The font size of the select control. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-font-weight** - The font weight of the select control. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-line-height** - The line height of the select control. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-form-field-tracking** - The letter spacing of the select control. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-select-container-shape** - The corner radius of the select container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-select-disabled-color** - The text color when the select is disabled. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-select-disabled-color-opacity** - The opacity level applied to the disabled text color. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-select-icon-size** - The size of the dropdown arrow icon. _(default: undefined)_

tags.name: m3e-split-pane
tags.description:
A dual-view layout that separates content with a movable drag handle.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Fired when the user finishes adjusting the drag handle.
- **input** - Fired continuously while the user adjusts the drag handle.

### **Methods:**
 - **collapse(): _void_** - Moves the drag handle to the collapsed position. If detents exist, snaps to the collapsed detent.
If no detents exist, moves to the minimum allowed value.
- **expand(): _void_** - Moves the drag handle to the expanded position. If detents exist, snaps to the expanded detent.
If no detents exist, moves to the maximum allowed value.
- **snapToValue(value: _number_): _void_** - Moves the drag handle to the specified position. If detents exist, snaps to the closest detent.
If no detents exist, moves to the specified value.
- **formDisabledCallback(disabled: _boolean_): _void_** - Called when the element is disabled or enabled via its form association.
- **formResetCallback(): _void_** - Called when the associated form is reset.

### **Slots:**
 - **start** - Renders content at the logical start side of the pane.
- **end** - Renders content at the logical end side of the pane.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-split-pane-drag-handle-hover-color** - Color used for the drag handle hover state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-split-pane-drag-handle-hover-opacity** - Opacity used for the drag handle hover state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-split-pane-drag-handle-focus-color** - Color used for the drag handle focus state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-split-pane-drag-handle-focus-opacity** - Opacity used for the drag handle focus state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-split-pane-drag-handle-color** - Background color of the drag handle when not pressed. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-split-pane-drag-handle-shape** - Corner shape of the drag handle when not pressed. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-split-pane-drag-handle-pressed-color** - Background color of the drag handle when pressed. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-split-pane-drag-handle-pressed-shape** - Corner shape of the drag handle when pressed. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-split-pane-drag-handle-container-width** - Width of the drag handle container. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-split-pane-drag-handle-width** - Thickness of the drag handle when not pressed. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-split-pane-drag-handle-height** - Length of the drag handle when not pressed. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-split-pane-drag-handle-pressed-width** - Thickness of the drag handle when pressed. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-split-pane-drag-handle-pressed-height** - Length of the drag handle when pressed. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: detents
attributes.description: Detents (discrete sizes) the start pane can snap to.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The accessible label given to the movable drag handle.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: A fractional value, between 0 and 100, indicating the maximum size of the start pane.

attributes.name: min
attributes.description: A fractional value, between 0 and 100, indicating the minimum size of the start pane.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: The orientation of the split.

attributes.name: overshoot-limit
attributes.description: A fractional value, between 0 and 100, indicating the maximum visual overshoot allowed when dragging past the minimum or maximum size.

attributes.name: step
attributes.description: A fractional value, between 0 and 100, indicating the increment by which to adjust the value when resized via keyboard.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: A fractional value, between 0 and 100, indicating the size of the start pane.

attributes.name: wrap-detents
attributes.description: Whether cycling through detents will wrap.

attributes.name: valueFormatter
attributes.description: A function used to generates human readable text for the accessible value (`aria-valuetext`) of the drag handle.

values.name:
(
    value: number,
    orientation: Omit<SplitPaneOrientation, "auto">,
    dir: Direction,
  ) => string

tags.name: m3e-step
tags.description:
A step in a wizard-like workflow.
---


### **Events:**
 - **input** - Emitted when the selected state changes.
- **change** - Emitted when the selected state changes.
- **click** - Emitted when the element is clicked.

### **Methods:**
 - **reset(): _void_** - Resets the step to its initial state, clearing any form data.
- **attach(control: _HTMLElement_): _void_** - Attaches the element to an interactive control.
- **detach(): _void_** - Detaches the element from its current interactive control.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the label of the step.
- **icon** - Renders the icon of the step.
- **done-icon** - Renders the icon of a completed step.
- **edit-icon** - Renders the icon of a completed editable step.
- **error-icon** - Renders icon of an invalid step.
- **hint** - Renders the hint text of the step.
- **error** - Renders the error message for an invalid step.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-step-shape** - Border radius of the step container, defining its visual shape. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-padding** - Internal padding of the step container, used for layout spacing. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-icon-shape** - Border radius of the icon container, controlling its geometric form. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-icon-size** - Width and height of the icon container and icon glyph. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-selected-icon-container-color** - Background color of the icon when the step is selected. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-selected-icon-color** - Foreground color of the icon when the step is selected. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-completed-icon-container-color** - Background color of the icon when the step is completed. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-completed-icon-color** - Foreground color of the icon when the step is completed. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-unselected-icon-container-color** - Background color of the icon when the step is inactive. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-unselected-icon-color** - Foreground color of the icon when the step is inactive. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-icon-error-color** - Foreground color of the icon when the step is invalid. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-disabled-icon-container-color** - Base color used to mix the disabled icon background. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-disabled-icon-color** - Base color used to mix the disabled icon foreground. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-label-color** - Text color of the step label in its default state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-label-error-color** - Text color of the step label when the step is invalid. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-disabled-label-color** - Base color used to mix the disabled label foreground. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-font-size** - Font size of the step label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-font-weight** - Font weight of the step label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-line-height** - Line height of the step label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-tracking** - Letter spacing of the step label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-icon-label-space** - Gap between icon and label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-hint-font-size** - Font size of hint and error messages. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-hint-font-weight** - Font weight of hint and error messages. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-hint-line-height** - Line height of hint and error messages. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-hint-tracking** - Letter spacing of hint and error messages. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-hint-color** - Text color of hint messages in valid state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-disabled-hint-color** - Base color used to mix the disabled hint foreground. _(default: undefined)_

- **--m3e-step-divider-color** - Color of the divider line between steps. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-step-divider-inset** - Inset offset for divider alignment within step layout. _(default: undefined)_

tags.name: m3e-switch
tags.description:
An on/off control that can be toggled by clicking.
---


### **Events:**
 - **input** - Emitted when the checked state changes.
- **change** - Emitted when the checked state changes.
- **click** - Emitted when the element is clicked.

### **Methods:**
 - **markAsPristine(): _void_** - Marks the element as pristine.
- **markAsDirty(): _void_** - Marks the element as dirty.
- **markAsTouched(): _void_** - Marks the element as touched.
- **markAsUntouched(): _void_** - Marks the element as untouched.
- **reportValidity(): _boolean_** - Returns `true` if the element has no validity problems; otherwise, returns `false`, fires
an invalid event, and (if the event isn't canceled) reports the problem to the user.
- **checkValidity(): _boolean_** - Returns `true` if the element has no validity problems; otherwise,
returns `false`, fires an invalid event.
- **setCustomValidity(error: _string_): _void_** - Sets a custom validity message for the element.
- **formDisabledCallback(disabled: _boolean_): _void_** - Called when the element is disabled or enabled via its form association.
- **formResetCallback(): _void_** - Called when the associated form is reset.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-switch-selected-icon-color** - Color of the icon when the switch is selected. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-selected-icon-size** - Size of the icon in the selected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-unselected-icon-color** - Color of the icon when the switch is unselected. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-unselected-icon-size** - Size of the icon in the unselected state. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-track-height** - Height of the switch track. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-track-width** - Width of the switch track. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-track-outline-color** - Color of the track's outline. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-track-outline-width** - Thickness of the track's outline. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-track-shape** - Corner shape of the track. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-selected-track-color** - Track color when selected. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-unselected-track-color** - Track color when unselected. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-unselected-handle-height** - Height of the handle when unselected. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-unselected-handle-width** - Width of the handle when unselected. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-with-icon-handle-height** - Height of the handle when icons are present. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-with-icon-handle-width** - Width of the handle when icons are present. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-selected-handle-height** - Height of the handle when selected. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-selected-handle-width** - Width of the handle when selected. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-pressed-handle-height** - Height of the handle during press. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-pressed-handle-width** - Width of the handle during press. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-handle-shape** - Corner shape of the handle. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-selected-handle-color** - Handle color when selected. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-unselected-handle-color** - Handle color when unselected. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-state-layer-size** - Diameter of the state layer overlay. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-state-layer-shape** - Corner shape of the state layer. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-disabled-selected-icon-color** - Icon color when selected and disabled. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-disabled-selected-icon-opacity** - Icon opacity when selected and disabled. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-switch-disabled-unselected-icon-color** - Icon color when unselected and disabled. _(default: undefined)_
