tags.name: m3e-tab
tags.description:
An interactive element that, when activated, presents an associated tab panel.
---


### **Events:**
 - **input** - Emitted when the selected state changes.
- **change** - Emitted when the selected state changes.
- **click** - Emitted when the element is clicked.

### **Methods:**
 - **attach(control: _HTMLElement_): _void_** - Attaches the element to an interactive control.
- **detach(): _void_** - Detaches the element from its current interactive control.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the label of the tab.
- **icon** - Renders an icon before the tab's label.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-tab-font-size** - Font size for tab label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-font-weight** - Font weight for tab label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-line-height** - Line height for tab label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-tracking** - Letter spacing for tab label. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-padding-start** - Padding on the inline start of the tab. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-padding-end** - Padding on the inline end of the tab. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-focus-ring-shape** - Border radius for the focus ring. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-selected-color** - Text color for selected tab. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-selected-container-hover-color** - Hover state-layer color for selected tab. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-selected-container-focus-color** - Focus state-layer color for selected tab. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-selected-ripple-color** - Ripple color for selected tab. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-unselected-color** - Text color for unselected tab. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-unselected-container-hover-color** - Hover state-layer color for unselected tab. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-unselected-container-focus-color** - Focus state-layer color for unselected tab. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-unselected-ripple-color** - Ripple color for unselected tab. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-disabled-color** - Text color for disabled tab. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-tab-disabled-opacity** - Text opacity for disabled tab. _(default: undefined)_

- **--m3e-rich-tooltip-subhead-line-height** - Line height of the subhead text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-rich-tooltip-subhead-tracking** - Letter‑spacing of the subhead text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-rich-tooltip-subhead-bottom-space** - Space below the subhead before the supporting text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-rich-tooltip-supporting-text-color** - Color of the supporting text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-rich-tooltip-supporting-text-font-size** - Font size of the supporting text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-rich-tooltip-supporting-text-font-weight** - Font weight of the supporting text. _(default: undefined)_

- **--m3e-rich-tooltip-supporting-text-tracking** - Letter‑spacing of the supporting text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-rich-tooltip-actions-padding-inline** - Horizontal padding applied to the actions slot area. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-rich-tooltip-actions-top-space** - Space above the actions slot. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-rich-tooltip-actions-bottom-space** - Space below the actions slot. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description: A value indicating whether the element's checked state is indeterminate.

tags.name: m3e-pseudo-radio
tags.description:
An element which looks like a radio button.
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-radio-icon-size** - Size of the radio icon. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-radio-unselected-icon-color** - Color of the unselected radio icon. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-radio-selected-icon-color** - Color of the selected radio icon. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-radio-disabled-icon-color** - Color of the disabled radio icon. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: A value indicating whether the element is checked.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: A value indicating whether the element is disabled.

tags.name: m3e-ripple
tags.description:
Connects user input to screen reactions using ripples.
---


### **Methods:**
 - **show(x: _number_, y: _number_, persistent: _boolean_): _void_** - Launches a manual ripple.
- **hide(): _void_** - Manually hides the ripple.
- **attach(control: _HTMLElement_): _void_** - Attaches the element to an interactive control.
- **detach(): _void_** - Detaches the element from its current interactive control.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-ripple-color** - The color of the ripple. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-ripple-enter-duration** - The duration for the enter animation (expansion from point of contact). _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-ripple-exit-duration** - The duration for the exit animation (fade-out). _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-ripple-opacity** - The opacity of the ripple. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-ripple-scale-factor** - The factor by which to scale the ripple. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-ripple-shape** - The shape of the ripple. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: centered
attributes.description:
Whether the ripple always originates from the center of the element's bounds, rather
than originating from the location of the click event.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description:
Whether click events will not trigger the ripple.
Ripples can be still controlled manually by using the `show` and 'hide' methods.

attributes.name: for
attributes.description: The identifier of the interactive control to which this element is attached.

attributes.name: radius
attributes.description: The radius, in pixels, of the ripple.

attributes.name: unbounded
attributes.description: Whether the ripple is visible outside the element's bounds.

tags.name: m3e-scroll-container
tags.description:
A vertically oriented content container which presents dividers above and below content when scrolled.
---


### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the scrollable content.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-divider-thickness** - Thickness of the divider lines above and below content. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-divider-color** - Color of the divider lines when visible. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-focus-ring-color** - Color of the focus ring outline. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-focus-ring-thickness** - Thickness of the focus ring outline. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-focus-ring-factor** - Animation factor for focus ring thickness. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-focus-ring-duration** - Duration of the focus ring animation. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: dividers
attributes.description: The dividers used to separate scrollable content.

attributes.name: thin
attributes.description: Whether to present thin scrollbars.

tags.name: m3e-slide
tags.description:
A carousel-like container used to horizontally cycle through slotted items.
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-slide-animation-duration** - The duration of transitions between slotted items. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: selected-index
attributes.description: The zero-based index of the visible item.

tags.name: m3e-state-layer
tags.description:
Provides focus and hover state layer treatment for an interactive element.
---


### **Methods:**
 - **show(state: _"hover" | "focused"_): _void_** - Launches a manual state layer.
- **hide(state: _"hover" | "focused"_): _void_** - Hides the state layer.
- **attach(control: _HTMLElement_): _void_** - Attaches the element to an interactive control.
- **detach(): _void_** - Detaches the element from its current interactive control.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-state-layer-duration** - Duration of state layer changes. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-state-layer-easing** - Easing curve of state layer changes. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-state-layer-focus-color** - Color on hover. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-state-layer-focus-opacity** - Opacity on focus. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-state-layer-hover-color** - Color on hover. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-state-layer-hover-opacity** - Opacity on hover. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description:
Whether hover and focus events will not trigger the state layer. State layers can still
be controlled manually using the `show` and `hide` methods.

attributes.name: disable-hover
attributes.description:
Whether hover events will not trigger the state layer. State layers can still
be controlled manually using the `show` and `hide` methods.

attributes.name: for
attributes.description: The identifier of the interactive control to which this element is attached.

tags.name: m3e-text-highlight
tags.description:
Highlights text which matches a given search term.
---


### **Events:**
 - **highlight** - Emitted when content is highlighted.

### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the content to highlight.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--m3e-text-highlight-container-color** - Background color applied to highlighted text ranges. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-text-highlight-color** - Foreground color of highlighted text content. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-text-highlight-decoration** - Optional text decoration (e.g., underline, line-through) for highlighted text. _(default: undefined)_
- **--m3e-text-highlight-shadow** - Optional text shadow for emphasis or contrast. _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: case-sensitive
attributes.description: Whether matching is case sensitive.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: A value indicating whether text highlighting is disabled.

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: The mode in which to highlight text.

attributes.name: term
attributes.description: The term to highlight.

tags.name: m3e-text-overflow
tags.description:
An inline container which presents an ellipsis when content overflows.
---


### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Renders the content to truncate with an ellipsis.
